event: presented to Accident and Emergency department
intra-osseous needle placed in right tibia
venous access via left femoral triple lumen central line
arterial pressure monitoring via right femoral 22G cannula
passed large volume of urine at induction
hemoglobin 8.0 g/dl at end of surgery
transported to pediatric Intensive Care Unit
postoperative fluid intake 2/3rd daily requirement orally
no residual defects from subdural hematoma
no residual defects from salt overdose
